hero.title: Global Markets. Seamless Access. Unmatched Speed.
hero.description: A premium capital platform for investors who expect precision execution, refined reporting, and trust at every interaction.
hero.emailPlaceholder: Enter your email for priority onboarding

home.featureSecurityBody: High-trust flows with premium visual clarity and strong contrast.
home.featurePerformanceBody: Decision-ready dashboards that keep the signal and remove the clutter.
home.featureCopyBody: Elegant expert cards, clear stats, and frictionless portfolio mirroring.
home.copyHeading: Expert-led allocations with cleaner copy-trading UX
home.copyBody: Compare conviction, follower confidence, and style fit at a glance. Every card is designed to feel calm, polished, and ready for a premium investor.
home.trustTitle: Built to earn confidence before it asks for capital
home.trustDescription: Security posture, guided onboarding, and transparent performance in one high-touch experience.
home.plansDescription: Focused options, clear ranges, and no clutter.
home.sponsorsHeading: Signals of trust, styled like a premium market brand
home.testimonialsHeading: What premium investors say after going live
home.testimonialsBody: We built the experience to feel clear, global, and dependable from the first deposit to the daily portfolio view.

testimonials.daniel: The deposit flow felt orderly and credible, and the dashboard became useful the moment my balance settled.
testimonials.liam: I appreciate how calm the platform feels. The plan comparison and activity tracking are much cleaner than typical retail products.
testimonials.sofia: Everything important is easy to understand. I can see my funding status, portfolio value, and opportunities without any clutter.
testimonials.aisha: The copy-trading section feels polished and trustworthy. It gives me enough context before I allocate capital.

about.title: A modern investment desk for globally minded clients
about.intro: Speed Global Trade blends private-client polish, data-rich reporting, and fast market access into one refined platform.
about.mission: To make global capital allocation feel intelligent, calm, and deeply trustworthy.
about.vision: To become the benchmark for premium digital investing across emerging and established markets.
about.styleBody: Quietly premium interfaces, investor-friendly clarity, and a strong bias toward trust signals.
about.philosophyTitle: We design for reassurance, not noise.
about.philosophyBody: From dashboard spacing to plan comparison, every detail is tuned to reduce doubt and support better investor decisions.

plans.title: Investment mandates, presented with clarity
plans.description: Each plan is structured to feel intentional, transparent, and easy to compare.

contact.title: Speak with the client success desk
contact.description: Questions about onboarding, copy portfolios, or strategic allocations? Our support flow is ready.
contact.name: Full name
contact.message: Tell us how we can help
contact.successDescription: A relationship manager will typically respond within one business cycle.
contact.clientSupportBody: 24/7 guided responses for onboarding and allocations
contact.officeBody: Canary Wharf, London - client-facing mock address

footer.headline: Capital access with a premium edge.
footer.subtext: Built for modern investors who want elegant controls, credible trust signals, and global-first support.
footer.copyright: Copyright © {year} Speed Global Trade. All rights reserved.

careers.title: Build the future of premium client investing
careers.description: We hire product-minded operators, designers, and market specialists who believe trust is a feature, not an afterthought.
careers.sectionOneBody: You will help shape a calm, high-trust financial experience for clients across multiple markets.
careers.sectionTwoBody: We value clarity, ownership, and careful execution over noise and unnecessary complexity.
careers.sectionThreeBody: Current openings span relationship operations, product design, compliance support, and platform engineering.

blog.title: Market perspectives for globally minded investors
blog.description: Our editorial desk shares platform updates, risk education, and allocation themes in a format built for clarity.
blog.sectionOneBody: Short, focused reads that explain the major signals shaping investor decisions.
blog.sectionTwoBody: Product releases are framed around usability, security posture, and transparent communication.
blog.sectionThreeBody: We publish practical guidance on funding, diversification, and reading portfolio performance.

help-center.title: Answers for onboarding, deposits, and account access
help-center.description: The help center is structured to keep clients moving with less friction and more confidence.
help-center.sectionOneBody: Learn how to open an account, complete your first deposit request, and activate your dashboard.
help-center.sectionTwoBody: We explain accepted rails, settlement expectations, and how deposit confirmation affects portfolio visibility.
help-center.sectionThreeBody: Use contact and chat support when you need help with access, settings, or transaction questions.

security.title: Security practices designed for a high-trust platform
security.description: Our product direction prioritizes session protection, guided onboarding, and careful handling of sensitive workflows.
security.sectionOneBody: Protected routes use signed sessions so access checks happen before the dashboard loads.
security.sectionTwoBody: Clear states, visible confirmations, and controlled flows reduce ambiguity during funding actions.
security.sectionThreeBody: We design interfaces and process language to support safer decisions and more transparent expectations.

privacy-policy.title: A clear view of how account information is handled
privacy-policy.description: This mock product demonstrates how a premium platform can communicate data practices in a simple, readable way.
privacy-policy.sectionOneBody: Account details are used to personalize access, dashboard views, and support experiences.
privacy-policy.sectionTwoBody: Deposits, withdrawals, and investment actions are retained to show consistent portfolio history.
privacy-policy.sectionThreeBody: Messages submitted through chat or forms may be used to improve response quality and service continuity.

terms-of-service.title: Platform terms built around clarity and accountability
terms-of-service.description: These placeholder terms outline how clients access the platform and what operational standards they can expect.
terms-of-service.sectionOneBody: Clients are responsible for accurate profile information and for protecting their login credentials.
terms-of-service.sectionTwoBody: Investment plans, copy-trading views, and portfolio metrics are presented as platform features and disclosures.
terms-of-service.sectionThreeBody: We may revise workflows, features, or support channels as the platform evolves toward production use.

risk-disclosure.title: Investment decisions require careful judgment
risk-disclosure.description: All investing involves risk, including the possible loss of capital. A premium interface does not remove market uncertainty.
risk-disclosure.sectionOneBody: Portfolio values may rise or fall due to macro events, liquidity shifts, and changing investor sentiment.
risk-disclosure.sectionTwoBody: Copy trading, concentrated plans, and higher-return mandates can involve materially different risk profiles.
risk-disclosure.sectionThreeBody: Clients should review plan details, ask questions, and consider whether an allocation fits their own objectives.

login.title: Access your investor workspace
login.description: Signed session cookies protect dashboard routes, while portfolio activity stays persisted locally in this mock environment.
login.demoDescription: Explore the premium dashboard with pre-seeded portfolio data.

signup.title: Create your premium investor profile
signup.description: This secure mock flow issues a signed session cookie and prepares an empty dashboard that activates after your first completed deposit.
signup.successDescription: Your workspace is ready. Complete your first deposit to activate portfolio tracking.

nav.title: Investor Desk
nav.subtitle: Private workspace
nav.signedOutDescription: Your secure session has been cleared.

empty.title: Your dashboard activates after your first completed deposit
empty.description: Create a deposit request, then use the simulation button to confirm it in this mock workflow. Once completed, your balance, chart, and transaction history will appear.
